docs.title: Welcome
docs.text: This project handles communication over websockets to a Jetson running ROS2 nodes.

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.text:
If the start script doesn't work:

  • Ensure the zero argument script has the correct IP for the Jetson
  • Ensure the Jetson has the correct IP for the control station.
  • Branches should both be on main.
